User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system, which can be a Dropshipper or an Admin, with their authentication and role information. Passwords are not stored in this entity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: Email address of the user, used for login.

role.description: The role of the user, defining their permissions and access levels. Can be Dropshipper or an Admin-level role.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

isActive.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active. Deactivated users cannot log in.

initialPasswordChangeRequired.description: Flag indicating if the user is required to change their password upon first login (e.g., for default Admin account).

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last successful login.

paymentDetails.description: Stores the user's payment information for withdrawals.

bankAccount.description: Bank account details (IBAN, bank name, etc.).

monthlySalesTarget.description: The individual monthly sales target for the dropshipper, set by the Admin.

monthlyReward.description: The reward amount for achieving the individual monthly sales target.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity, for presence tracking.

shiftStatus.description: Indicates if the staff member is currently on or off shift.

activeShiftId.description: The ID of the currently active work session document, if any.

activeShiftStartTime.description: The start time of the currently active shift.

canTrackShift.description: Flag indicating if a dropshipper is allowed to use the shift tracking feature (for salaried dropshippers).

referrerId.description: The ID of the user who referred this user.

referralCode.description: The unique referral code for this user to share.

level.description: The gamification level of the marketer.

referredUsersCount.description: The number of users this marketer has successfully referred.

staffDetails.description: Stores monthly goals and progress for staff members.

monthlyTask.description: A description of the monthly task or goal for the staff member.

taskProgress.description: The progress of the task, from 0 to 100.

taskReward.description: The reward amount for completing the task.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product available for dropshipping within the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

price.description: The selling price of the product.

commission.description: The commission for the dropshipper on selling this product.

stockQuantity.description: Current quantity of the product in stock.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for dropshippers to sell.

videoUrl.description: URL to a video of the product.

imageUrls.description: URLs to images of the product.

purchaseUrl.description: URL to the product's purchase page for the admin or merchant.

merchantInfo.description: Contact information for the external merchant who owns this product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

isAvailable.description: Controls category visibility in the store.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer order placed by a Dropshipper.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

dropshipperId.description: Reference to the User (Dropshipper role) who placed this order.

dropshipperName.description: Denormalized name of the dropshipper for display in admin panels.

customerName.description: Full name of the end customer.

customerPhone.description: Phone number of the end customer.

customerAddress.description: Street address of the end customer for delivery.

customerCity.description: City or governorate of the end customer for delivery.

customerPaymentMethod.description: The payment method selected by the end customer, e.g., Cash on Delivery.

customerNotes.description: Additional notes provided by the dropshipper or customer.

customerPaymentStatus.description: The verification status of the customer's direct payment.

totalAmount.description: The total calculated amount for the order, including all items.

totalCommission.description: Total commission for the dropshipper for this order.

platformFee.description: The platform's fee (e.g., 10%) calculated on the product price for this order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order status or details were last updated.

unitPrice.description: Unit price of the product at time of order.

unitCommission.description: Unit commission for the dropshipper at time of order.

confirmedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was confirmed and stock was deducted.

confirmedBy.description: The admin/manager who confirmed the order.

stockApplied.description: Flag indicating if stock deduction has been successfully applied for this order.

stockAppliedAt.description: Timestamp for when stock was applied.

stockRestored.description: Flag indicating if stock has been restored for a cancelled/returned order.

stockError.description: Stores details if a stock deduction failed.

merchantInfo.description: Denormalized contact info for the external merchant if the product is externally sourced.

Shipment.title: Shipment
Shipment.description: Represents a shipping record connected to an order, managed via a carrier like Bosta.

ShipmentEvent.title: Shipment Event
ShipmentEvent.description: A single event in the timeline of a shipment's tracking history.

rawPayload.description: JSON string of the raw webhook payload for this event.

StockLedger.title: Stock Ledger
StockLedger.description: Records all changes to product stock levels for auditing purposes.

changeQty.description: Negative for deduction, positive for restore.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included in an Order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the parent Order. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product included in this order item. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product ordered.

unitPrice.description: The price of the product unit at the time the order was placed.

subtotal.description: The subtotal amount for this order item (quantity * unitPrice).

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Configurable payment methods available in the system (e.g., Vodafone Cash, InstaPay).

id.description: Unique identifier for the PaymentMethod entity.

name.description: User-friendly name of the payment method (e.g., 'Vodafone Cash').

identifier.description: The payment identifier or account number (e.g., phone number, wallet ID) for this method.

instructions.description: Instructions on how users can make a payment using this method.

isActive.description: Indicates if the payment method is currently active and available for use.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment method was added to the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment method details were last updated.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Represents a payment transaction made by a Dropshipper for a specific Order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order associated with this payment.

dropshipperId.description: Reference to the User (Dropshipper role) who made this payment.

dropshipperName.description: Denormalized name of the dropshipper who made this payment.

paymentMethodId.description: Reference to the PaymentMethod used for this payment.

amount.description: The amount paid in this transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment status or details were last updated.

adminNotes.description: Notes added by an Admin regarding the payment review process.

senderPhoneNumber.description: The phone number of the account that sent the payment.

referenceNumber.description: Optional reference number for the transaction provided by the user.

WithdrawalRequest.title: WithdrawalRequest
WithdrawalRequest.description: Represents a request from a user (Dropshipper) to withdraw their earnings.

userId.description: The ID of the user making the request.

userName.description: Denormalized name of the user for easy display in admin panels.

method.description: The payment method for the withdrawal.

paymentIdentifier.description: The specific account identifier for the chosen withdrawal method (e.g., phone number, IBAN).

status.description: The current status of the withdrawal request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated.

adminNotes.description: Optional notes from the admin who processed the request.

Bonus.title: Bonus
Bonus.description: Represents a manual bonus or deduction applied to a user's account by an admin.

amount.description: The bonus amount. Can be negative for deductions.

reason.description: Reason for the bonus/deduction, e.g., 'Monthly Target Reward'.

adminId.description: The ID of the admin who granted the bonus.

adminName.description: The name of the admin who granted the bonus.

SystemSetting.title: SystemSetting
SystemSetting.description: Represents a global configuration setting for the entire system, managed by Admins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SystemSetting entity.

settingKey.description: A unique key identifying the specific system setting (e.g., 'defaultCurrency', 'googleDriveRootFolderId').

settingValue.description: The value associated with the system setting.

description.description: A description of what this system setting controls.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the system setting was last updated.

updatedByUserId.description: Reference to the User (Admin role) who last updated this setting. (Relationship: User 1:N SystemSetting)

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records sensitive operations and changes within the system for security and compliance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed the action. (Relationship: User 1:N AuditLog)

action.description: A description of the action performed (e.g., 'Product created', 'Order status updated').

entityType.description: The type of entity affected by the action (e.g., 'User', 'Product', 'Order').

entityId.description: The unique identifier of the entity affected by the action.

oldValue.description: JSON string representing the state of the entity BEFORE the action, if applicable.

newValue.description: JSON string representing the state of the entity AFTER the action, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the audit log entry was recorded.

ipAddress.description: IP address from which the action was initiated.

googleDriveFileId.description: Google Drive File ID for the backup of this audit log entry.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a generated analytical report, which can be exported and stored.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Report entity.

dropshipperId.description: Reference to the User (Dropshipper role) for whom this report was generated, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N Report)

adminId.description: Reference to the User (Admin role) who generated this report, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N Report)

reportType.description: The type or category of the report (e.g., 'Sales Summary', 'Profit Report', 'Dropshipper Performance').

parameters.description: JSON string of parameters or filters used to generate the report (e.g., date range, specific product IDs).

filePath.description: URL or identifier for the generated report file in storage (e.g., Google Drive).

fileType.description: The file format of the generated report.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the report was generated.

googleDriveFileId.description: Google Drive File ID for the backup of this report file.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a chat conversation between two or more users.

participantDetails.description: Denormalized user details, mapping userId to an object with name and role.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a single message within a conversation.

WorkSession.title: WorkSession
WorkSession.description: Represents a single work session for a staff member, tracking their clock-in and clock-out times.

id.description: Unique identifier for the work session.

userId.description: The ID of the user this session belongs to.

startTime.description: Timestamp when the work session started.

endTime.description: Timestamp when the work session ended.

durationMinutes.description: The total duration of the work session in minutes, calculated upon ending the shift.

ProductClick.title: ProductClick
ProductClick.description: Represents a single click on a product link.

PublicSettings.title: Public Settings
PublicSettings.description: A single document holding all public-facing system settings.

MerchantInquiry.title: Merchant Inquiry
MerchantInquiry.description: Represents an inquiry from a potential merchant wanting to sell their products.

ReferredCustomer.title: Referred Customer
ReferredCustomer.description: Represents a customer who came through a marketer referral link.

contactId.description: Customer's unique ID, e.g., phone number or PSID.

AutomationSettings.title: Automation Settings
AutomationSettings.description: A single document holding all marketing automation settings.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The `userId` in the path must match `request.auth.uid` for a user to access their own data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, typically matching Firebase Authentication's UID.

definition.description: Orders placed by a specific user. Nested for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The owner of the order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Withdrawal requests made by a specific user. Nested for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user making the request.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique ID for the withdrawal request.

definition.description: Globally available products. Admins and Product Managers have write access. Dropshippers have read access.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for a product.

definition.description: Globally available product categories. Admins and Product Managers have write access. All signed-in users have read access.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a product category.

definition.description: Global collection of all payment proofs submitted by users. Access is controlled by security rules.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique ID for the payment transaction.

definition.description: This collection's document existence grants Admin rights.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID assigned the 'Admin' role.

definition.description: Grants Product Manager rights.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID assigned the 'Product Manager' role.

definition.description: Grants Orders Manager rights.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID assigned the 'Orders Manager' role.

definition.description: Grants Finance Manager rights.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID assigned the 'Finance Manager' role.

definition.description: Audit trail for all stock movements. Writes should be performed via transactions by authorized staff.

params.name: ledgerId
params.description: The unique identifier for a stock ledger entry.

definition.description: Globally configured payment methods. Dropshippers can read active payment methods, while Admins have full CRUD access to manage them.

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: The unique identifier for a payment method.

definition.description: A record of a manual bonus or deduction applied to a user's account by an admin. Nested under the user for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user receiving the bonus.

params.name: bonusId
params.description: The unique ID for the bonus transaction.

definition.description: Top-level collection for all shipments. Accessible by staff.

params.name: shipmentId
params.description: The unique ID for the shipment.

definition.description: Tracking history events for a specific shipment.

params.name: shipmentId
params.description: The parent shipment ID.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique ID for the shipment event.

definition.description: Global system configurations. Only Admins have CRUD access to these settings.

params.name: settingKey
params.description: A unique key identifying the system setting (e.g., 'defaultCurrency').

definition.description: A single document containing all publicly readable settings. Anyone can read, only admins can write.
System-wide audit log entries for sensitive operations. Accessible only by Admins. Writes should be performed by trusted server-side functions.

params.name: auditLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for an audit log entry.

definition.description: Stores conversation metadata. Only participants can read or write.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conversation.

definition.description: Stores messages for a conversation. Only participants can read or create messages.

params.name: conversationId
params.description: The parent conversation ID.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID for the message.

definition.description: Stores work session records for a staff member. A user can only access their own sessions, while admins can list all sessions.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID of the staff member.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work session.

definition.description: Stores click events for a specific product, used for analytics.

params.name: productId
params.description: The ID of the product being clicked.

params.name: clickId
params.description: The unique ID for the click event.

definition.description: Stores inquiries from potential merchants. Anyone can create, but only staff can read/manage.

params.name: inquiryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the merchant inquiry.

definition.description: Stores information about customers acquired through referral links.

params.name: customerId
params.description: Unique customer identifier, typically their phone number.

definition.description: Defines an automated marketing campaign for a specific customer segment.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: The unique identifier for a marketing campaign.

definition.description: A single document containing all marketing automation settings. Admin only.
